Analiza: Spain have looked more solid and better organised so far, especially at the back, and that gives them the edge in this matchup. Portugal can keep it competitive, but Spain still seem the more reliable side over 90 minutes. That makes the straight Spain win the cleanest angle here.

Argentina are still the stronger side on paper, but this does not look like a match that has to turn into an open, high-scoring game. Egypt should be more comfortable trying to keep things compact and survive in stages, which gives the under a better shape than chasing a bigger Argentina margin.
